Text: The IF-NAV-STATE interface shall provide the POSITION packet over ARINC664.
The IF-NAV-STATE interface shall be developed to DAL A.
The IF-NAV-STATE interface shall provide the STATUS packet over ARINC664.
The IF-NAV-STATE interface shall be developed to DAL A.
The IF-NAV-STATE interface shall provide the VELOCITY packet over ARINC664.
The IF-NAV-STATE interface shall be developed to DAL A.
The latitude signal shall be encoded as float64.
The latitude signal shall represent values in the range [-90, 90] deg.
The longitude signal shall be encoded as float64.
The longitude signal shall represent values in the range [-180, 180] deg.
The altitude_msl signal shall be encoded as float32.
The altitude_msl signal shall represent values in the range [-500, 8000] m.
The nav_valid signal shall be encoded as bool.
The nav_valid signal shall represent values in the range [0, 1] .
The nav_mode signal shall be encoded as enum.
The nav_mode signal shall represent values in the range [0, 3] .
The vel_north signal shall be encoded as float32.
The vel_north signal shall represent values in the range [-100, 100] m/s.
The vel_east signal shall be encoded as float32.
The vel_east signal shall represent values in the range [-100, 100] m/s.
The vel_down signal shall be encoded as float32.
The vel_down signal shall represent values in the range [-30, 30] m/s.
The ground_speed signal shall be encoded as float32.
The ground_speed signal shall represent values in the range [0, 140] m/s.
The IF-FCC-MOTOR-CMD interface shall provide the ROTOR_CMD packet over ARINC429.
The IF-FCC-MOTOR-CMD interface shall be developed to DAL A.
The rotor_speed_cmd signal shall be encoded as uint16.
The rotor_speed_cmd signal shall represent values in the range [0, 6000] rpm.
The torque_limit signal shall be encoded as int16.
The torque_limit signal shall represent values in the range [-400, 500] N*m.
The IF-AHRS interface shall provide the ATTITUDE packet over ARINC429.
The IF-AHRS interface shall be developed to DAL A.
The roll signal shall be encoded as float32.
The roll signal shall represent values in the range [-180, 180] deg.
The pitch signal shall be encoded as float32.
The pitch signal shall represent values in the range [-90, 90] deg.
The yaw signal shall be encoded as float32.
The yaw signal shall represent values in the range [0, 360] deg.
The roll_rate signal shall be encoded as float32.
The roll_rate signal shall represent values in the range [-300, 300] deg/s.
The pitch_rate signal shall be encoded as float32.
The pitch_rate signal shall represent values in the range [-300, 300] deg/s.
The yaw_rate signal shall be encoded as float32.
The yaw_rate signal shall represent values in the range [-200, 200] deg/s.
The IF-MOTOR-TELEM interface shall provide the MOTOR_TELEMETRY packet over ARINC429.
The IF-MOTOR-TELEM interface shall be developed to DAL B.
The motor_temp_1 signal shall be encoded as int16.
The motor_temp_1 signal shall represent values in the range [-40, 200] degC.
The motor_temp_2 signal shall be encoded as int16.
The motor_temp_2 signal shall represent values in the range [-40, 200] degC.
The motor_temp_3 signal shall be encoded as int16.
The motor_temp_3 signal shall represent values in the range [-40, 200] degC.
The motor_temp_4 signal shall be encoded as int16.
The motor_temp_4 signal shall represent values in the range [-40, 200] degC.
The motor_rpm_fb signal shall be encoded as uint16.
The motor_rpm_fb signal shall represent values in the range [0, 6000] rpm.
The inverter_temp signal shall be encoded as int16.
The inverter_temp signal shall represent values in the range [-40, 150] degC.
The IF-ENV interface shall provide the AIR_DATA packet over CAN.
The IF-ENV interface shall be developed to DAL D.
The oat signal shall be encoded as int16.
The oat signal shall represent values in the range [-60, 60] degC.
The static_pressure signal shall be encoded as uint16.
The static_pressure signal shall represent values in the range [300, 1100] hPa.
The baro_alt signal shall be encoded as float32.
The baro_alt signal shall represent values in the range [-500, 8000] m.
The IF-BMS-CAN interface shall provide the PACK_TELEMETRY packet over CAN.
The IF-BMS-CAN interface shall be developed to DAL C.
The IF-BMS-CAN interface shall provide the CELL_HEALTH packet over CAN.
The IF-BMS-CAN interface shall be developed to DAL C.
The pack_voltage signal shall be encoded as uint16.
The pack_voltage signal shall represent values in the range [0, 900] V.
The pack_current signal shall be encoded as int16.
The pack_current signal shall represent values in the range [-600, 600] A.
The cell_temp_max signal shall be encoded as int16.
The cell_temp_max signal shall represent values in the range [-40, 120] degC.
The cell_volt_min signal shall be encoded as uint16.
The cell_volt_min signal shall represent values in the range [0, 5] V.
The soc_estimate signal shall be encoded as uint8.
The soc_estimate signal shall represent values in the range [0, 100] %.
